data.body: Evaluate each action state skill prompt in skills/*.md and ensure that ALL paths (success AND failure modes) specify --add-handoff-capsule with all agent metadata arguments (--handoff-agentname, --handoff-model, --handoff-version, --handoff-date, --handoff-username). Currently some skills (planning.md, shipment.md) have no handoff capsule at all, and failure modes across all skills only use --add-note without recording a handoff capsule. Every state transition (including deferrals and rejections) should record a handoff capsule so agent provenance is always captured.
data.title: Audit skill prompts: require handoff capsules with full agent metadata on all paths
